summary.zh: 让列表项按短间隔依次进入，表达顺序并保持整体节奏。
summary.en: Introduce list items at short intervals to communicate order and rhythm.

definition.zh: 让多个项目依次播放动画，并在相邻项目之间加入短延迟，形成级联节奏。
definition.en: Related items start at offset times, turning one transition into a readable sequence.

description.zh: 控制一次动效完成所需的时间。
description.en: Controls the time required for one motion cycle.

description.zh: 控制元素移动的空间距离。
description.en: Controls how far the element travels.

description.zh: 控制速度随时间变化的方式。
description.en: Controls how velocity changes over time.

purpose.zh: 通过短间隔依次引入同组项目，表达顺序、归属和整体节奏。
purpose.en: Introduce grouped items at short intervals to communicate order, grouping, and rhythm.

frequency.zh: 适合低频列表首次出现；持续更新的列表应缩短间隔或同时更新。
frequency.en: Use for a list's low-frequency first appearance; shorten or remove staggering for continuously updating lists.

trigger.zh: 由整组数据就绪或容器进入视口触发，项目顺序遵循阅读方向。
trigger.en: Trigger when the group is ready or its container enters view, following reading order.

enterExit.zh: 进入按顺序错开；离开通常整体淡出，确有层级含义时再反向错开。
enterExit.en: Stagger entrances in order; usually fade exits together and reverse-stagger only when hierarchy benefits.

interruptibility.zh: 数据变化时只动画新增或移动的项目，现有项目保持当前位置。
interruptibility.en: On data changes, animate only added or moved items while existing items keep their position.

gestureRules.zh: 项目可点击时，第一项出现后即可操作；键盘顺序始终遵循 DOM。
gestureRules.en: Make items operable as soon as they appear, and keep keyboard order aligned with the DOM.

reducedMotion.zh: 取消项目间延迟，让整组内容同步短淡入或立即显示。
reducedMotion.en: Remove inter-item delay and show the group immediately or with one short shared fade.

reviewNotes.zh: 总时长包含最后一个项目的延迟，避免列表等待过久。
reviewNotes.en: Include the final item's delay in the total-duration review.

reviewNotes.zh: 控制项目数量，超长列表仅动画首屏可见部分。
reviewNotes.en: For long lists, animate only the initially visible items.
